title: Dryopteris monosora
intro: Dryopteris monosora, commonly known as the Silver Fern or Autumn Fern, is a species of deciduous fern in the genus Dryopteris. The plant is rich in health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Dryopteris monosora include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues.
taxonomy: Dryopteris monosora is a species of fern in the genus Dryopteris. It belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The genus Dryopteris is a part of the order Polypodiales. This species is a member of the class Polypodiopsida and the phylum Pteridophyta. Dryopteris monosora is a type of terrestrial fern commonly found in tropical regions.
